name: stripe
description: Access Stripe payment data, customers, subscriptions, and balance information

envVars.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
envVars.description: Stripe Webhook Secret (optional, for webhook verification)

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List Stripe customers with optional filtering

tools.name: Get Customer
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific customer

tools.name: List Payments
tools.description: List payment intents with optional status filtering

tools.name: List Subscriptions
tools.description: List subscriptions with optional status filtering

prompts.title: Check account balance
prompts.prompt: Check my Stripe account balance and provide a summary of available and pending funds.

prompts.title: Recent payments
prompts.prompt: Show me the most recent successful payments in my Stripe account.

prompts.title: Customer overview
prompts.prompt: Give me an overview of my Stripe customers including total count and recent additions.

prompts.title: Subscription status
prompts.prompt: Show me the status of all active subscriptions and any that are expiring soon.
